commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Control UI `.log-stream` CSS from a fixed 500px maximum height to a viewport-relative maximum with a 200px minimum and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the Logs tab renders `.log-stream` and the stylesheet caps that container at 500px, so a tall viewport with enough log rows will leave unused vertical space.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-supplied real UI proof, or a maintainer proof override, is the remaining merge gate; there is no narrow code repair for automation to generate.
